suggested_rules: A route proposal that predates implementation and differs only in naming (descriptive corridor name vs. official route ID) merges into the implemented route record as a lifecycle stage.
suggestion.rationale: Both records refer to the same S79 SBS route on Staten Island. The proposed record (2011) is the pre-implementation stage of the route that launched in 2012 and is still in service. Strong identity fields (SBS variant, geographic corridor Hylan/Richmond) agree; differences in route ID ("proposed Hylan/Richmond SBS" vs "S79+") are source-local naming before formalization. Per route lifecycle rule and same-object test, these merge into one canonical record.
